pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.1.6 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline and uses Jakarta EE namespaces; running Spring Boot 3 on Java 11 or with javax.* imports causes runtime linkage errors and missing class exceptions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the managed Java version property from 11 to 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x enforces Java 17 as the minimum runtime; compiling or running with Java 11 results in immediate startup failures due to unsupported bytecode version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.el-api dependency with jakarta.el-api to comply with Jakarta EE namespace migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x removes support for javax.* packages; using javax.el-api causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime when the application expects Jakarta EE classes.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Replace Apache HttpClient 4.x URIBuilder import with Apache HttpClient 5.x equivalent to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.why_exists: The class org.apache.http.client.utils.URIBuilder does not exist in Apache HttpClient 5; using it causes a compile error (cannot find symbol).

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Replace deprecated MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8 with MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON as Spring Framework 6 removed the UTF-8 specific constant.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.why_exists: MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8 is removed in Spring Framework 6; using it causes a compile error (cannot find symbol).
MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8 was removed in Spring Framework 6.0 (Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile error.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/repositor.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/repositor.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/repositor.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/repositor.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on Java 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/routers/A.general_idea: Remove deprecated MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8 constant replaced by MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON in Spring Framework 6.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/routers/A.why_exists: MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8 was removed in Spring Framework 6 (required by Spring Boot 3), causing a compilation error.

src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.general_idea: Replace the deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8 constant with APPLICATION_JSON to align with Spring Boot 3.x API changes.
src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.why_exists: The constant APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8 was removed in Spring Framework 6.x (used by Spring Boot 3), causing a compilation error if referenced.

src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.general_idea: Update logic to compare against APPLICATION_JSON instead of the removed APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8 constant.
src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.why_exists: The constant APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8 was removed in Spring Framework 6.x, causing a compilation error if referenced.

src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.general_idea: Update payload wrapper creation to use APPLICATION_JSON instead of the removed APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8 constant.
src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.why_exists: The constant APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8 was removed in Spring Framework 6.x, causing a compilation error if referenced.

src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.general_idea: Replace deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8 media type with APPLICATION_JSON.
src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.why_exists: APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8 was deprecated in Spring Framework 5.3 and removed in Spring Framework 6.0 (Spring Boot 3). Using it causes a compile error because the constant no longer exists.

src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Remove explicit SpringExtension registration in favor of Spring Boot 3's automatic JUnit 5 extension detection.
src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.why_exists: SpringExtension is deprecated in Spring Boot 3 and removed in later versions; @ExtendWith is no longer needed as Spring Boot auto-registers the extension.

src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Replace deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8 constant with APPLICATION_JSON constant.
src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.why_exists: MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE was removed in Spring Framework 6 (required by Spring Boot 3), causing a compile error.
MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE was removed in Spring Framework 6 (used by Spring Boot 3) because UTF-8 is the default charset for JSON; using the old constant causes a compile error.
